title: 4 x 4M Rolls Of Christmas Wrapping Paper - Cute Kids Designs - Festive Wrap - Red Dudolph, Grey Penguin, Blue Gonk, Blue Santa - Complete With 16 Matching Luggage Style Gift Tags
features: Set Of 4 CPaperute Kids Christmas Gift Wrap. 4M x 70cm with 16 Matching Gift tags.

CHEERFUL GIFT WRAPPING - Delight the little ones this festive season with our adorable set of 4 kids' cute Christmas gift wrapping paper. Each roll measures 4 meters in length and 70 cm in width, providing ample coverage for all your gift-wrapping needs. Complete with 16 matching luggage-style gift tags with ribbon, this set ensures your presents look beautifully coordinated and festive.

CUTE DESIGNS - The set features a variety of charming and cute Christmas designs that capture the joy and wonder of Christmas for children. With four assorted rolls, offering different patterns to suit various tastes and gift recipients make each gift unique and exciting. Blue with Christmas Gonks, charming little gonks in cosy hats add a whimsical, on-trend feel. Red with Rudolph Faces. Bold and bright with smiling reindeer faces, guaranteed to delight. Grey with Penguins. Sweet penguins in winter scarves and hats bring a frosty-cute finish. Light Blue with Santa. Jolly Santa Claus motifs that capture the magic of Christmas Eve.

GREAT COVERAGE - Each roll measures 4 meters (length) x 70 cm (width) approximately, providing enough paper to wrap multiple gifts of various sizes. Suitable for wrapping large presents as well as smaller ones. At 4 metres long, each roll gives you plenty of paper for several presents, ensuring no last minute shortages when wrapping. The 70cm width makes it wide enough for larger items yet manageable for smaller packages, giving you versatility without waste.

MATCHING TAGS - Also included, is a pack of 16 luggage style gift tags. Matching tags enhance the overall aesthetic of your wrapped gifts designed to bring joy and convenience to your gift wrapping. Each coordinated tag comes complete with a ribbon for easy attachment to your presents. This set makes an excellent choice for a beautifully coordinated and festive holiday season.

FULLY RECYCLABLE - Our paper is also fully recyclable too! Helping you to do your part in being more ecofriendly all year round. The paper is shipped in a custom made double walled sturdy postal box which adds extra protection to prevent damaged rolls during transit. Ensuring safe arrival of your paper and tags!
description: Product Description Set Of 4 Cute Christmas Gift Wrap. 4M x 70cm With 16 Matching Gift tags. Delight the little ones this festive season with our adorable set of 4 kids' cute Christmas gift wrapping paper. Each roll measures 4 meters in length and 70 cm in width, providing ample coverage for all your gift-wrapping needs. Complete with 16 matching luggage-style gift tags with ribbon, this set ensures your presents look beautifully coordinated and festive. Each coordinated tag comes complete with a ribbon for easy attachment to your presents. The set features a variety of charming and cute Christmas designs that capture the joy and wonder of Christmas for children. With four assorted rolls, offering different patterns to suit various tastes and gift recipients make each gift unique and exciting. Light Blue with Santa A cheerful light blue paper with jolly Santa Claus motifs, showing Santa with his big red suit, twinkling eyes, and fluffy white beard. Surrounded by snowflakes and stars, this design captures the magic and excitement of Christmas Eve, perfect for wrapping special gifts from Santa himself. Red with Rudolph Faces A bold, jolly red roll scattered with smiling Rudolph faces, complete with shiny red noses and antlers. This playful design is bursting with Christmas spirit, instantly bringing a joyful, childlike excitement to every gift.. Grey with Penguins A stylish light grey background featuring chubby penguins dressed in winter hats and scarves, waddling among festive stars. This roll captures the fun of winter days and snowy adventures, adding a frosty-cute look that children will love. Blue with Christmas Gonk A soft, wintry blue backdrop dotted with adorable Scandinavian-inspired gonks, each with long white beards and tall pointed hats. These little characters are trendy, whimsical, and full of Nordic charm, making this design feel cosy and modern. Each roll measures 4 meters (length) x 70 cm (width) approximately, providing enough paper to wrap multiple gifts of various sizes. Suitable for wrapping large presents as well as smaller ones. At 4 metres long, each roll gives you plenty of paper for several presents, ensuring no last minute shortages when wrapping. The 70cm width makes it wide enough for larger items yet manageable for smaller packages, giving you versatility without waste. The paper is shipped in a custom made double walled sturdy postal box which adds extra protection to prevent damaged rolls during transit. Ensuring safe arrival of your paper and tags!
